title: Fascist Movements in the Interwar Period
further_info: Recommended Reading Bosworth, Richard James Boon (Hg.): The Oxford Handbook of Fascism, Oxford 2009. Clark, Roland: Holy Legionary Youth: Fascist Activism in Interwar Romania, Ithaca, NY 2015. Griffin, Roger: The Nature of Fascism, London 1991. Marcon, Federico: Fascism: The History of a Word, Chicago 2025. Oppermann, Paula: Thunder Cross: Fascist Antisemitism in Twentieth-Century Latvia, Madison 2025. Reichardt, Sven: Faschistische Kampfbünde: Gewalt und Gemeinschaft im italienischen Squadrismus und in der deutschen SA, Köln 2002.
